facts.statement: Joel built the brand identity and Webflow website for ArtPärdē, a San Francisco 501(c)(3) performing-arts nonprofit (2024, ongoing), and still keeps the site current when new shows land.

The deliberate decision was boring, durable tooling for a volunteer-run nonprofit: Webflow so a new show is a content edit, Zeffy because it takes zero platform fees, with the craft budget spent on the brand.
The ARTPÄRDĒ wordmark went through image-model-assisted concepting, a typeface study across dozens of settings, and was finally vectorized letter by letter: machine breadth, human finish.
Two years on, the site is still the organization's home; updates take minutes and nothing has needed rescuing.
